name: Gang Ba Curry with Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 6 Red chili peppers, cut into 4 or 5 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. If the mushrooms are very large, cut them in half; however, it is traditional not to cut them in Thai cooking.
2. Heat the oil in a wok over medium heat.
3. Add the curry paste and stir-fry until it releases its aroma.
4. Add 3 cups of water, mushrooms, soy sauce, and sugar. Bring to a boil and adjust the seasonings if necessary.
5. Add the basil, kaffir leaves, and chili peppers. Mix gently and serve hot with rice.
NOTE: I make variations of this by adding a bunch of assorted, cubed vegetables which I stir-fry for a few moments before adding the water. Using the vegetables gives a main dish rather than just a side dish. Good vegetables in this curry are: eggplant, zucchini, corn, cauliflower, and bamboo shoots (I'm not sure how Thai this ingredient is though).
